programme.desc: While traveling through Shoshone territory, Adam Cartwright is ambushed by Indians and left for dead. He is rescued and nursed back to health by a mysterious mountain woman known to the tribe as the "White Buffalo Woman"—whom Adam discovers is actually a white woman named Ruth Halversen. Because the tribe believes Ruth has lost her sacred healing powers, they have sentenced her to death, but her ability to heal Adam's wounds gives her a chance to save her own life

programme.title: Bonanza Season 2 Episode 9 Breed of Violence
programme.desc: When Joe Cartwright is accused of murder after a violent confrontation in a nearby town, Ben Cartwright must race against time and a vengeful sheriff to prove his son's innocence before he is subjected to mob justice

programme.title: The Big Cat (1949)
programme.desc: An escaped convict hiding out in the mountains finds redemption when he helps a local family protect their home and their livestock from a predatory cougar that is terrorizing the rural community.

programme.title: Wagon Train S2E35 The Andrew Hale Story
programme.desc: A disgraced former judge joins the wagon train, seeking redemption while struggling to maintain his authority and moral compass when he is forced to preside over a tense, life-or-death trial involving members of the expedition.

programme.title: Riffleman S1E8 The Safe Guard
programme.desc: When a local man is accused of murder, Lucas McCain finds himself caught between the community's demand for swift mob justice and his own belief in the rule of law as he attempts to protect the prisoner until a proper trial can be held

programme.title: Keoma The Avenger 1976
programme.desc: In Keoma the Avenger, Franco Nero stars as a half-breed gunslinger who returns home from the Civil War to find his town enslaved by tyranny and violence. Haunted by visions and driven by a fierce sense of justice, Keoma faces his ruthless half-brothers and a brutal warlord in a struggle for freedom. With its haunting atmosphere, gritty violence, and powerful performances, this Spaghetti Western classic blends myth and vengeance into an unforgettable tale.

programme.title: Death Rides The Range 1939
programme.desc: In Death Rides the Range, a band of ruthless spies schemes to steal America’s uranium supply, but they didn’t count on the Three Mesquiteers! Leaping into action, the daring trio battles danger on the open frontier, matching fists, six-guns, and wits against a deadly enemy. Packed with intrigue, hard-riding action, and patriotic spirit, this adventure delivers Western thrills with a timely twist.

programme.title: Gunman From Bodie
programme.desc: Buck poses as a wanted killer and Sandy as a cook as the trio help ranchers stop a ruthless crook from taking over the area s water rights and help an orphaned baby.

programme.title: Four of the Apocalypse 1975
programme.desc: In Four of the Apocalypse, director Lucio Fulci delivers a gritty and haunting Spaghetti Western. After a crooked sheriff banishes four misfits—a gambler, a prostitute, a drunk, and a simple-minded man—they journey across a lawless frontier searching for survival and redemption. But their path collides with a sadistic bandit, plunging them into violence, cruelty, and despair. Blending raw brutality with moments of tenderness, this bleak tale explores the struggle for humanity in a world gone savage.

programme.title: Branded A Coward
programme.desc: Johnny Hume witnesses the slaughter of his family at age six. When he grows into manhood, will he be able to seek his vengeance?
